narrative:
Precinct Harrison East & New Madison (precinct in Darke County) has 986 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.4 percentage points.
